intro: APT28 (Fancy Bear) and Mustang Panda were the most active threat actors in a recent wave of espionage activity documented across seven reports. These incidents, all rated high or critical in severity, targeted a wide range of sectors including government, healthcare, technology, banking, and critical infrastructure. The campaigns had a global footprint, with notable impact in India, South Korea, Ukraine, and the United Kingdom. This concentrated burst of cyber espionage operations occurred over a short period in April 2026.
